shallow_tree.definition: topo74 M16 parent array with the #259 scratch-suspect interior nodes [6,9,10] PRUNED; remaining = spine(9) + first-level rho2 branch-hit(4) = 13 nodes.

step_model.model: verify-step marginal is PER-ROW (per-node) in the M<=32 flat regime: lawine #153 step(M) grows via per-candidate GEMM/sampler/argmax rows, and denken #85 measured (on the EXACT topo74 M16 tree) centroid_sampler ~M^0.75 / verify_argmax ~M^0.94 while attention AMORTIZES (M8->M32 1.06x). The shallow tree has the SAME max-depth (8) and max-branch (3) as the full tree, so ALL the saving is the 3 fewer verify ROWS, none from depth. step_shallow = built_step - 3 * per-node-marginal (anchored to the banked built step; lawine curve supplies only the relative per-node shape).

denken85_corroboration.note: verify-side non-GEMM overhead is per-row (+2.18us/node M8->M16); attention amortizes (1.06x) -> cost is node-count-bound, not depth-bound.

floor_and_clears_RETIRED_ANCHOR.BASIS_NOTE: RETIRED: this block prices the shallow tree at the 1.085 analytic step (denken #241), which denken #257 empirically retired. Kept for continuity / audit of the first-pass 506.27 read. The LIVE headline is grounded_step_257.

crossover.note: the shallow tree needs only a 0.697% step reduction to clear 500; the banked per-node verify cost predicts 1.928% from dropping 3 of 16 rows -- so it clears unless > 63.8% of the verify marginal is fixed/depth-bound (denken #85 refutes: attention amortizes 1.06x, marginal is per-row).

grounded_step_257.BASIS_NOTE: denken #257 (eee4603) forward-pass roofline RETIRED the 1.085 analytic step. g_d_measured=0.0195 (~9x below the assumed 0.168). Re-prices the SAME shallow tree (E[T]=4.3003, same -0.0209 ms per-node saving) at the GROUNDED built steps.

bracket.label: grounded_optimistic_1p12
bracket.basis: denken #257 assumed-g_d=0.168 b5 (band-low, most optimistic grounded)

bracket.label: grounded_central_1p346
bracket.basis: denken #257 MEASURED g_d=0.0195 b5 (CENTRAL -- the new headline basis)

inversion.note: at the grounded central step the shallow tree needs E[T]=5.2883 to clear 500 (+0.9880 over the fidelity-safe 4.3003). That target EXCEEDS even the FULL tree's E[T]=4.512 by +0.7763; the deep branch-interior (#259) is worth only +0.2117, so adding it back still falls 0.7763 short -- NO tree route clears 500 at the grounded step.

lambda_hat_flag.note: lambda-hat=0.9780112974 clears the 0.978 P95 bar by only 1.13e-05 -- essentially ZERO validity headroom. The E[T]=5.2883 the build must reach (point 2) must come from genuinely better DRAFTING, NOT from relaxing acceptance: any E[T] bought by accepting lower-prob draft tokens lowers lambda-hat below 0.9780 and BREAKS the P95 validity gate.

serve_lever_secondary.source: kanna #260 greedy-safe serve-layer tau tie-breaker (additive, NOT load-bearing)
serve_lever_secondary.applied_to: GROUNDED-central shallow TPS (the honest basis), NOT the retired 506.27
serve_lever_secondary.note: SECONDARY / tau-term -- does NOT carry the headline and does NOT rescue the miss (+0.06% on ~406 TPS is ~+0.25 TPS). The grounded headline rests on E[T]=4.3003 at the denken #257 grounded step.

verdict.headline: NO ROUTE TO 500 AT THE GROUNDED STEP -- shallow MISSES (~406.6 TPS) and even the FULL tree (E[T]=4.512) misses; clearing 500 needs E[T]=5.288 (+0.776 over the full tree)

table.tree: full 16-node @ RETIRED 1.085 step (land #245 path, old read)

verdict.one_line_read: at denken #257's grounded central built step (1.346 ms) the fidelity-safe shallow tree implies ~406.6 TPS and MISSES 500; clearing 500 there needs E[T]=5.288, which exceeds even the FULL tree's 4.512 by +0.776 -- so NO tree route (shallow OR land #245's deep branch) reaches 500 at the grounded step. The first-pass 506.27 read was an artifact of the retired 1.085 anchor.

imports_unchanged.note: BASELINE 481.53, the 520.95 lambda=1 ceiling, K_cal=125.268, lambda-hat 0.9780113, the 4.3305 (1.085-step) floor and the #259 confirmed_et 4.3003 are IMPORTED EXACTLY and UNCHANGED. This REVISION re-prices the banked projection at the GROUNDED (denken #257) step -- which is HIGHER, not cheaper -- flipping the headline; it moves no measurement. land #245 owns the live build.

handoff: on denken #257's GROUNDED central built step, the fidelity-safe 13-node shallow tree (spine + first-level rho2) has E[T]=4.3003 at step_shallow=1.324919 ms, whose E_T floor is 5.2883, so it MISSES 500 at implied 406.59 TPS -- a fidelity-RISK-FREE route to 500 does NOT exist at the grounded step; clearing 500 at this step needs E[T]=5.288, which exceeds even the FULL 16-node tree's E[T]=4.512 by +0.776 -- so NEITHER the shallow tree NOR land #245's deep-branch reconstruction reaches 500 at the grounded step.
scope: LOCAL CPU-only analytic composition of banked figures. Re-prices whether the fidelity-SAFE 13-node shallow sub-tree (spine + first-level rho2, dropping the scratch-suspect deep branch-interior) clears 500 at the GROUNDED built step (denken #257), as a step-conditioned bracket + inverted E[T] break-even + lambda-hat headroom flag. No GPU / vLLM / HF Job / submission / served-file change / official draw. BASELINE stays 481.53; adds 0 TPS. land #245 owns the live measurement. NOT a launch. NOT open2.
